// Generated by BoltFFI. Do not edit.
private object {{ map_name }} {
    private val map = mutableMapOf<Long, {{ interface_name }}>()
    private var nextHandle: Long = 1L

    fun insert(callback: {{ interface_name }}): Long {
        val handle = nextHandle
        nextHandle += 1L
        map[handle] = callback
        return handle
    }

    fun get(handle: Long): {{ interface_name }}? = map[handle]

    fun remove(handle: Long): {{ interface_name }}? = map.remove(handle)
}

object {{ bridge_name }} {
{% if has_async_methods %}    private val pendingAsyncCallbacks = mutableMapOf<Long, Long>()
    private val asyncCallbackScope = kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope(
        kotlinx.coroutines.SupervisorJob() + kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers.Default
    )

{% endif %}    fun retain(callback: {{ interface_name }}): Long = {{ map_name }}.insert(callback)

    fun release(handle: Long) {
        {{ map_name }}.remove(handle)
    }
{% for method in method_sources %}
{{ method }}
{% endfor %}
}
